name: Cocktail Crab Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the catsup, horseradish, and hot sauce.
2. Remove any remaining filament from the crabmeat.
3. Add the flaked crabmeat to the catsup mixture and continue to blend until smooth.
4. Add all other ingredients (white onion and salt) and blend until smooth.
5. Serve at room temperature. Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Salty Potato Chips, Potato Skins, Green Bell Peppers, Turnips
